title: Fix share dialog title showing 'Settings' instead of 'Share'

requirements.summary: Update the settings dialog title to dynamically reflect the active tab, showing 'Share' when the Share tab is selected instead of the generic 'Settings' heading
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the 'Share' tab in the settings dialog shows 'Share' as the dialog title, not 'Settings'.
The dialog title updates dynamically based on the selected tab.
Other tabs (Background, Music, Alerts, Timer Tabs) continue to display 'Settings' or their own appropriate titles without regression.

file_operations.description: Modify the settings dialog to dynamically update the title and subtitle based on the currently active tab. Add logic to track which tab is selected (Background, Music, Alerts, Timer Tabs, or Share) and render the appropriate title. When the Share tab is active, display 'Share' as the title with a relevant subtitle (e.g., 'Share your timer setup'). For other tabs, continue displaying 'Settings' or tab-specific titles as appropriate. Ensure the tab selection state is managed properly to trigger title updates when users switch between tabs.
